name: kbridge-slider-crank-sweep
description: Regression guard for KinematicBridge B-bug-008 (prismatic anti-roll frame fix). CPig-only: reads the bridge-translated slider-crank .kin.json and SWEEPS it (Read Mechanism -> Sweep(Live) -> Pose at Step -> Preview Diagram), posing the skeleton mid-sweep (step 17/34 ~= 85 deg). Before the fix the assembly would not converge (rms 0.207, step scale collapsed) so no sweep was possible; the `Converged` assert below is the actual guard. The sweep range is overridden to 0 -> 2.967 rad (= 170 deg) at the Sweep node to stay short of the 180 deg dead-center singularity (B-cand-008). No KinematicImporter needed (CPig-only). Capture-only screenshots; pass/fail is the asserts. Slop fixture: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/slider-crank-sweep-skeleton.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A CPig frame-triad + link-polyline skeleton of a slider-crank mechanism posed mid-motion (crank rotated about 85 degrees from rest): a crank arm, a connecting rod, and a slider, forming one connected closed-loop linkage at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view of the swept slider-crank skeleton.
